sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115475" key="yeudiso/domos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδῐσόδομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n115475.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">built of equal blocks, but in courses of unequal size,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.8.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
